{{Not to be confused with|September 3|qq=September 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chūhira|ja|中平|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūhira|qq=}} 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:189|189]] [[:en:September 30|September 30]] ） – [[:en:Han_dynasty#Eastern_Han|Later Han]]{{citation needed|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Later Han|qq=}} の都・{{ill|Luoyang|ja|洛陽|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Luoyang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 洛陽市}} を占領した [[:en:Dong Zhuo|Dong Zhuo]] が [[:en:Liu Bian|Shaodi Bian]] を廃し [[:en:Emperor Xian of Han|Xian Di]] を擁立
== Births == * [[:en:Engi (era)|Engi]] 12nd year（{{ill|912|ja|912|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/912|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ） – [[:en:Ryōgen|Ryōgen]] 、[[:en:Tiantai|Tendai sect]] 中興の祖（+ {{ill|985|ja|985|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/985|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} ） * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 1st year（[[:en:1161|1161]] [[:en:September 23|September 23]] ） – {{ill|Taka-kura Tennō|ja|Emperor Takakura|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taka-kura Tennō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 、80代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1181|1181]] ） * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year（[[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – [[:en:Takeda Nobuyoshi|Takeda Shinyoshi]] 、[[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] の五男（+ [[:en:1603|1603]] ） * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 3rd year（[[:en:1675|1675]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Higashiyama|Tōzan Tennō]] 、113代天皇（+ [[:en:1709|1709]] ） * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 5th year（[[:en:1808|1808]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|lt=Sakai Tadayoshi|lt_ja=酒井忠良|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|qq=}} 、[[:en:Isesaki Domain|Isesaki Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1834|1834]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 9th year（[[:en:1286|1286]] [[:en:September 22|September 22]] ） – [[:en:Mugaku Sogen|Mukaku Sogen]] 、[[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai sect]] の {{ill|monk|ja|Monk侶|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/monk|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} （* [[:en:1226|1226]] ） * [[:en:Bunpō|Bunpō]] 1st year（[[:en:1317|1317]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Fushimi|Fushimi Tennō]] 、92代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （* [[:en:1265|1265]] ） * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9th year（[[:en:1632|1632]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Asano Nagaakira|Asano Nagamasa]] 、[[:en:Ashimori Domain|Ashimori Domain]] 主、[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主、[[:en:Hiroshima Domain|Hiroshima Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1586|1586]] )
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|2|9|4|8|3|10|9|0903|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初三|qq=}} {{zh:九月初三|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初三|qq=}} {{zh:九月初三|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初三|qq=}} {{zh:九月初三|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初三]]
{{translated page|ja|9月3日 (旧暦)|version=46622867|comment=Imported full ja history}}

== Events == * {{ill|Chūhira|ja|中平|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūhira|qq=}} 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:189|189]] [[:en:September 30|September 30]] ） – [[:en:Han_dynasty#Eastern_Han|Later Han]]{{citation needed|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Later Han|qq=}} の都・{{ill|Luoyang|ja|洛陽|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Luoyang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 洛陽市}} を占領した [[:en:Dong Zhuo|Dong Zhuo]] が [[:en:Liu Bian|Shaodi Bian]] を廃し [[:en:Emperor Xian of Han|Xian Di]] を擁立
== Births == * [[:en:Engi (era)|Engi]] 12nd year（[[:en:912|912]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ） – [[:en:Ryōgen|Ryōgen]] 、[[:en:Tiantai|Tendai sect]] 中興の祖（+ [[:en:985|985]] ） * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 1st year（[[:en:1161|1161]] [[:en:September 23|September 23]] ） – {{ill|Taka-kura Tennō|ja|Emperor Takakura|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taka-kura Tennō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 、80代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1181|1181]] ） * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year（[[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – [[:en:Takeda Nobuyoshi|Takeda Shinyoshi]] 、[[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] の五男（+ [[:en:1603|1603]] ） * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 3rd year（[[:en:1675|1675]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Higashiyama|Tōzan Tennō]] 、113代天皇（+ [[:en:1709|1709]] ） * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 5th year（[[:en:1808|1808]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|lt=Sakai Tadayoshi|lt_ja=酒井忠良|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|qq=}} 、[[:en:Isesaki Domain|Isesaki Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1834|1834]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 9th year（[[:en:1286|1286]] [[:en:September 22|September 22]] ） – [[:en:Mugaku Sogen|Mukaku Sogen]] 、[[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai sect]] の [[:en:Monk|monk]] （* [[:en:1226|1226]] ） * [[:en:Bunpō|Bunpō]] 1st year（[[:en:1317|1317]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Fushimi|Fushimi Tennō]] 、92代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （* [[:en:1265|1265]] ） * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9th year（[[:en:1632|1632]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Asano Nagaakira|Asano Nagamasa]] 、[[:en:Ashimori Domain|Ashimori Domain]] 主、[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主、[[:en:Hiroshima Domain|Hiroshima Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1586|1586]] )

== Births == * [[:en:Engi (era)|Engi]] 12nd year（[[:en:912|912]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ） – [[:en:Ryōgen|Ryōgen]] 、[[:en:Tiantai|Tendai sect]] 中興の祖（+ [[:en:985|985]] ） * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 1st year（[[:en:1161|1161]] [[:en:September 23|September 23]] ） – {{ill|Taka-kura Tennō|ja|Emperor Takakura|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taka-kura Tennō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 、80代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1181|1181]] ） * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year（[[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – [[:en:Takeda Nobuyoshi|Takeda Shinyoshi]] 、[[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] の五男（+ [[:en:1603|1603]] ） * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 3rd year（[[:en:1675|1675]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Higashiyama|Tōzan Tennō]] 、113代天皇（+ [[:en:1709|1709]] ） * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 5th year（[[:en:1808|1808]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|lt=Sakai Tadayoshi|lt_ja=酒井忠良|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|qq=|1=Sakai Tadakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644167}} 、[[:en:Isesaki Domain|Isesaki Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1834|1834]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 9th year（[[:en:1286|1286]] [[:en:September 22|September 22]] ） – [[:en:Mugaku Sogen|Mukaku Sogen]] 、[[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai sect]] の [[:en:Monk|monk]] （* [[:en:1226|1226]] ） * [[:en:Bunpō|Bunpō]] 1st year（[[:en:1317|1317]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Fushimi|Fushimi Tennō]] 、92代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （* [[:en:1265|1265]] ） * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9th year（[[:en:1632|1632]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Asano Nagaakira|Asano Nagamasa]] 、[[:en:Ashimori Domain|Ashimori Domain]] 主、[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主、[[:en:Hiroshima Domain|Hiroshima Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1586|1586]] )

== Births == * [[:en:Engi (era)|Engi]] 12nd year（[[:en:912|912]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ） – [[:en:Ryōgen|Ryōgen]] 、[[:en:Tiantai|Tendai sect]] 中興の祖（+ [[:en:985|985]] ） * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 1st year（[[:en:1161|1161]] [[:en:September 23|September 23]] ） – {{ill|Taka-kura Tennō|ja|Emperor Takakura|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taka-kura Tennō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 、80代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1181|1181]] ） * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year（[[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – [[:en:Takeda Nobuyoshi|Takeda Shinyoshi]] 、[[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] の五男（+ [[:en:1603|1603]] ） * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 3rd year（[[:en:1675|1675]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Higashiyama|Tōzan Tennō]] 、113代天皇（+ [[:en:1709|1709]] ） * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 5th year（[[:en:1808|1808]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|lt=Sakai Tadayoshi|lt_ja=酒井忠良|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|qq=|1=Sakai Tadakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644167}} 、[[:en:Isesaki Domain|Isesaki Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1834|1834]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 9th year（[[:en:1286|1286]] [[:en:September 22|September 22]] ） – [[:en:Mugaku Sogen|Mukaku Sogen]] 、[[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai sect]] の [[:en:Monk|monk]] （* [[:en:1226|1226]] ） * [[:en:Bunpō|Bunpō]] 1st year（[[:en:1317|1317]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Fushimi|Fushimi Tennō]] 、92代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （* [[:en:1265|1265]] ） * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9th year（[[:en:1632|1632]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Asano Nagaakira|Asano Nagamasa]] 、[[:en:Ashimori Domain|Ashimori Domain]] 主、[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主、[[:en:Hiroshima Domain|Hiroshima Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1586|1586]] )
== See Also ==

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840404]] Wikidata name: 3rd day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 3|qq=September 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chūhira|ja|中平|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūhira|qq=|1=Zhongping|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011722}} 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:189|189]] [[:en:September 30|September 30]] ） – [[:en:Han_dynasty#Eastern_Han|Later Han]]{{citation needed|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Later Han|qq=}} の都・{{ill|Luoyang|ja|洛陽|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Luoyang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 洛陽市|1=Luoyang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187136}} を占領した [[:en:Dong Zhuo|Dong Zhuo]] が [[:en:Liu Bian|Shaodi Bian]] を廃し [[:en:Emperor Xian of Han|Xian Di]] を擁立
== Births == * [[:en:Engi (era)|Engi]] 12nd year（[[:en:912|912]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ） – [[:en:Ryōgen|Ryōgen]] 、[[:en:Tiantai|Tendai sect]] 中興の祖（+ [[:en:985|985]] ） * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 1st year（[[:en:1161|1161]] [[:en:September 23|September 23]] ） – {{ill|Taka-kura Tennō|ja|Emperor Takakura|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taka-kura Tennō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 、80代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1181|1181]] ） * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year（[[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – [[:en:Takeda Nobuyoshi|Takeda Shinyoshi]] 、[[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] の五男（+ [[:en:1603|1603]] ） * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 3rd year（[[:en:1675|1675]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Higashiyama|Tōzan Tennō]] 、113代天皇（+ [[:en:1709|1709]] ） * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 5th year（[[:en:1808|1808]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|lt=Sakai Tadayoshi|lt_ja=酒井忠良|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|qq=|1=Sakai Tadakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644167}} 、[[:en:Isesaki Domain|Isesaki Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1834|1834]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 9th year（[[:en:1286|1286]] [[:en:September 22|September 22]] ） – [[:en:Mugaku Sogen|Mukaku Sogen]] 、[[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai sect]] の [[:en:Monk|monk]] （* [[:en:1226|1226]] ） * [[:en:Bunpō|Bunpō]] 1st year（[[:en:1317|1317]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Fushimi|Fushimi Tennō]] 、92代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （* [[:en:1265|1265]] ） * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9th year（[[:en:1632|1632]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Asano Nagaakira|Asano Nagamasa]] 、[[:en:Ashimori Domain|Ashimori Domain]] 主、[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主、[[:en:Hiroshima Domain|Hiroshima Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1586|1586]] )

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840404]] Wikidata name: 3rd day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 3|qq=September 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} == Events == * {{ill|Chūhira|ja|中平|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūhira|qq=|1=Zhongping|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011722}} 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:189|189]] [[:en:September 30|September 30]] ） – [[:en:Han_dynasty#Eastern_Han|Later Han]]{{citation needed|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Later Han|qq=}} の都・{{ill|Luoyang|ja|洛陽|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Luoyang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 洛陽市|1=Luoyang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187136}} を占領した [[:en:Dong Zhuo|Dong Zhuo]] が [[:en:Liu Bian|Shaodi Bian]] を廃し [[:en:Emperor Xian of Han|Xian Di]] を擁立
== Events ==
* [[:ja:中平|Zhongping]] 6 ( [[:simple:September_30|September 30,]] [[:simple:189|189]] [[:simple:Julian_calendar|in the Julian calendar]] ) - [[:simple:Dong_Zhuo|Dong Zhuo]], who occupied [[:simple:Luoyang|Luoyang]], the capital of [[:ja:後漢|the Later Han Dynasty]], deposed [[:ja:少帝弁|Emperor Bian]] and installed [[:ja:献帝_(漢)|Emperor Xian.]] * [[:simple:Tenpyō|Tenpyo]] 12 ( [[:simple:September_28|September 28,]] [[:simple:740|740]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:藤原広嗣の乱|Fujiwara no Hirotsugu Rebellion]] . Dazai no Shoni Fujiwara no Hirotsugu rebelled in [[:ja:筑紫|Tsukushi]] in an attempt to remove [[:ja:吉備真備|Kibi no Makibi]] and others from the government. The rebellion was suppressed two months later, and Kibi no Makibi was demoted. * [[:simple:Bunji_(era)|Bun'ei]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_14|October 14]] [[:simple:1189|, 1189]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:源頼朝|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] attacks Hiraizumi in Oshu. [[:ja:藤原泰衡|Fujiwara no Yasuhira]] is killed by his retainers while fleeing, and [[:ja:奥州藤原氏|the Oshu Fujiwara clan]] is destroyed. * [[:simple:Hōreki|Horeki]] 8 ( [[:simple:October_4|October 4,]] [[:simple:1758|1758]] [[:simple:Gregorian_calendar|in the Gregorian calendar]] ) - [[:ja:徳川家重|Tokugawa Ieshige]] 's chamberlain, [[:simple:Tanuma_Okitsugu|Tanuma Okitsugu,]] is [[:simple:Daimyo|granted]] an additional stipend of 10,000 koku and becomes a daimyo in the shogunate. * [[:simple:Ansei|Ansei]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_9|October 9,]] [[:simple:1858|1858]] [[:simple:Gregorian_calendar|in the Gregorian calendar]] ) - [[:ja:日仏修好通商条約|Treaty of Amity and Commerce between Japan and France]] signed
== Births == * [[:en:Engi (era)|Engi]] 12nd year（[[:en:912|912]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ） – [[:en:Ryōgen|Ryōgen]] 、[[:en:Tiantai|Tendai sect]] 中興の祖（+ [[:en:985|985]] ） * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 1st year（[[:en:1161|1161]] [[:en:September 23|September 23]] ） – {{ill|Taka-kura Tennō|ja|Emperor Takakura|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taka-kura Tennō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 、80代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1181|1181]] ） * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year（[[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – [[:en:Takeda Nobuyoshi|Takeda Shinyoshi]] 、[[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] の五男（+ [[:en:1603|1603]] ） * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 3rd year（[[:en:1675|1675]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Higashiyama|Tōzan Tennō]] 、113代天皇（+ [[:en:1709|1709]] ） * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 5th year（[[:en:1808|1808]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|lt=Sakai Tadayoshi|lt_ja=酒井忠良|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|qq=|1=Sakai Tadakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644167}} 、[[:en:Isesaki Domain|Isesaki Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1834|1834]] ）
== Births ==
* [[:simple:Engi_(era)|Engi]] 12 ( [[:simple:October_15|October 15,]] [[:simple:912|912]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:良源|Ryogen]], the founder of [[:ja:天台宗|the Tendai]] sect (d [[:simple:985|. 985]] ) * The first year of [[:simple:Ōhō|the Oho era]] ( [[:simple:September_23|September 23,]] [[:simple:1161|1161]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:simple:Emperor_Takakura|Emperor Takakura]], the 80th [[:simple:Emperor_of_Japan|Emperor]] (d [[:simple:1181|. 1181]] ) * [[:simple:Tenshō_(Momoyama_period)|Tensho]] 11 ( [[:simple:October_18|October 18,]] [[:simple:1583|1583]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:武田信吉|Takeda Nobuyoshi]], fifth son of [[:simple:Tokugawa_Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (born [[:simple:1603|1603]] ) * [[:simple:Enpō|Enpo]] 3 ( [[:simple:October_21|October 21,]] [[:simple:1675|1675]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:東山天皇|Emperor Higashiyama]], 113th Emperor (d [[:simple:1709|. 1709]] ) * [[:simple:Bunka|Bunka]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_22|October 22,]] [[:simple:1808|1808]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:酒井忠良_(伊勢崎藩主)|Sakai Tadayoshi]], [[:ja:伊勢崎藩|Lord of Isesaki Domain]] (d [[:simple:1834|. 1834]] )
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 9th year（[[:en:1286|1286]] [[:en:September 22|September 22]] ） – [[:en:Mugaku Sogen|Mukaku Sogen]] 、[[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai sect]] の [[:en:Monk|monk]] （* [[:en:1226|1226]] ） * [[:en:Bunpō|Bunpō]] 1st year（[[:en:1317|1317]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Fushimi|Fushimi Tennō]] 、92代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （* [[:en:1265|1265]] ） * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9th year（[[:en:1632|1632]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Asano Nagaakira|Asano Nagamasa]] 、[[:en:Ashimori Domain|Ashimori Domain]] 主、[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主、[[:en:Hiroshima Domain|Hiroshima Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1586|1586]] )
== Deaths ==
* [[:simple:Kōan_(Kamakura_period)|Koan]] 9 ( [[:simple:September_22|September 22,]] [[:simple:1286|1286]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:無学祖元|Mugai Sogen]], a [[:ja:臨済宗|Rinzai sect]] [[:ja:比丘|monk]] (born [[:simple:1226|1226]] ) * First year of [[:simple:Bunpō|the Bunpo era]] ( [[:simple:October_8|October 8,]] [[:simple:1317|1317]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:simple:Emperor_Fushimi|Emperor Fushimi]], the 92nd Emperor (* [[:simple:1265|1265]] ) * [[:simple:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9 ( [[:simple:October_16|October 16,]] [[:simple:1632|1632]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:浅野長晟|Asano Nagaakira]], [[:ja:足守藩|Lord of the Ashimori Domain]], [[:ja:紀州藩|Lord of the Kishu Domain]], and [[:ja:広島藩|Lord of the Hiroshima Domain]] (* [[:simple:1586|1586]] )

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840404]] Wikidata name: 3rd day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 3|qq=September 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} == Events == * {{ill|Chūhira|ja|中平|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūhira|qq=|1=Zhongping|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011722}} 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:189|189]] [[:en:September 30|September 30]] ） – [[:en:Han_dynasty#Eastern_Han|Later Han]]{{citation needed|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Later Han|qq=}} の都・{{ill|Luoyang|ja|洛陽|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Luoyang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 洛陽市|1=Luoyang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187136}} を占領した [[:en:Dong Zhuo|Dong Zhuo]] が [[:en:Liu Bian|Shaodi Bian]] を廃し [[:en:Emperor Xian of Han|Xian Di]] を擁立
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zhongping|ja|中平|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūhira|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011722}} 6 ( [[:simple:September_30|September 30,]] [[:simple:189|189]] [[:simple:Julian_calendar|in the Julian calendar]] ) - [[:simple:Dong_Zhuo|Dong Zhuo]], who occupied [[:simple:Luoyang|Luoyang]], the capital of [[:ja:後漢|the Later Han Dynasty]], deposed [[:ja:少帝弁|Emperor Bian]] and installed [[:ja:献帝_(漢)|Emperor Xian.]] * [[:simple:Tenpyō|Tenpyo]] 12 ( [[:simple:September_28|September 28,]] [[:simple:740|740]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:藤原広嗣の乱|Fujiwara no Hirotsugu Rebellion]] . Dazai no Shoni Fujiwara no Hirotsugu rebelled in [[:ja:筑紫|Tsukushi]] in an attempt to remove [[:ja:吉備真備|Kibi no Makibi]] and others from the government. The rebellion was suppressed two months later, and Kibi no Makibi was demoted. * [[:simple:Bunji_(era)|Bun'ei]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_14|October 14]] [[:simple:1189|, 1189]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:源頼朝|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] attacks Hiraizumi in Oshu. [[:ja:藤原泰衡|Fujiwara no Yasuhira]] is killed by his retainers while fleeing, and [[:ja:奥州藤原氏|the Oshu Fujiwara clan]] is destroyed. * [[:simple:Hōreki|Horeki]] 8 ( [[:simple:October_4|October 4,]] [[:simple:1758|1758]] [[:simple:Gregorian_calendar|in the Gregorian calendar]] ) - [[:ja:徳川家重|Tokugawa Ieshige]] 's chamberlain, [[:simple:Tanuma_Okitsugu|Tanuma Okitsugu,]] is [[:simple:Daimyo|granted]] an additional stipend of 10,000 koku and becomes a daimyo in the shogunate. * [[:simple:Ansei|Ansei]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_9|October 9,]] [[:simple:1858|1858]] [[:simple:Gregorian_calendar|in the Gregorian calendar]] ) - [[:ja:日仏修好通商条約|Treaty of Amity and Commerce between Japan and France]] signed
== Births == * [[:en:Engi (era)|Engi]] 12nd year（[[:en:912|912]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ） – [[:en:Ryōgen|Ryōgen]] 、[[:en:Tiantai|Tendai sect]] 中興の祖（+ [[:en:985|985]] ） * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 1st year（[[:en:1161|1161]] [[:en:September 23|September 23]] ） – {{ill|Taka-kura Tennō|ja|Emperor Takakura|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taka-kura Tennō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 、80代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1181|1181]] ） * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year（[[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – [[:en:Takeda Nobuyoshi|Takeda Shinyoshi]] 、[[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] の五男（+ [[:en:1603|1603]] ） * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 3rd year（[[:en:1675|1675]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Higashiyama|Tōzan Tennō]] 、113代天皇（+ [[:en:1709|1709]] ） * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 5th year（[[:en:1808|1808]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|lt=Sakai Tadayoshi|lt_ja=酒井忠良|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|qq=|1=Sakai Tadakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644167}} 、[[:en:Isesaki Domain|Isesaki Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1834|1834]] ）
== Births ==
* [[:simple:Engi_(era)|Engi]] 12 ( [[:simple:October_15|October 15,]] [[:simple:912|912]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:良源|Ryogen]], the founder of [[:ja:天台宗|the Tendai]] sect (d [[:simple:985|. 985]] ) * The first year of [[:simple:Ōhō|the Oho era]] ( [[:simple:September_23|September 23,]] [[:simple:1161|1161]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:simple:Emperor_Takakura|Emperor Takakura]], the 80th [[:simple:Emperor_of_Japan|Emperor]] (d [[:simple:1181|. 1181]] ) * [[:simple:Tenshō_(Momoyama_period)|Tensho]] 11 ( [[:simple:October_18|October 18,]] [[:simple:1583|1583]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:武田信吉|Takeda Nobuyoshi]], fifth son of [[:simple:Tokugawa_Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (born [[:simple:1603|1603]] ) * [[:simple:Enpō|Enpo]] 3 ( [[:simple:October_21|October 21,]] [[:simple:1675|1675]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:東山天皇|Emperor Higashiyama]], 113th Emperor (d [[:simple:1709|. 1709]] ) * [[:simple:Bunka|Bunka]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_22|October 22,]] [[:simple:1808|1808]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:酒井忠良_(伊勢崎藩主)|Sakai Tadayoshi]], [[:ja:伊勢崎藩|Lord of Isesaki Domain]] (d [[:simple:1834|. 1834]] )
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 9th year（[[:en:1286|1286]] [[:en:September 22|September 22]] ） – [[:en:Mugaku Sogen|Mukaku Sogen]] 、[[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai sect]] の [[:en:Monk|monk]] （* [[:en:1226|1226]] ） * [[:en:Bunpō|Bunpō]] 1st year（[[:en:1317|1317]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Fushimi|Fushimi Tennō]] 、92代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （* [[:en:1265|1265]] ） * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9th year（[[:en:1632|1632]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Asano Nagaakira|Asano Nagamasa]] 、[[:en:Ashimori Domain|Ashimori Domain]] 主、[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主、[[:en:Hiroshima Domain|Hiroshima Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1586|1586]] )
== Deaths ==
* [[:simple:Kōan_(Kamakura_period)|Koan]] 9 ( [[:simple:September_22|September 22,]] [[:simple:1286|1286]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:無学祖元|Mugai Sogen]], a [[:ja:臨済宗|Rinzai sect]] [[:ja:比丘|monk]] (born [[:simple:1226|1226]] ) * First year of [[:simple:Bunpō|the Bunpo era]] ( [[:simple:October_8|October 8,]] [[:simple:1317|1317]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:simple:Emperor_Fushimi|Emperor Fushimi]], the 92nd Emperor (* [[:simple:1265|1265]] ) * [[:simple:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9 ( [[:simple:October_16|October 16,]] [[:simple:1632|1632]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:浅野長晟|Asano Nagaakira]], [[:ja:足守藩|Lord of the Ashimori Domain]], [[:ja:紀州藩|Lord of the Kishu Domain]], and [[:ja:広島藩|Lord of the Hiroshima Domain]] (* [[:simple:1586|1586]] )

Dazai no Shoni Fujiwara no Hirotsugu rebelled in [[:ja:筑紫|Tsukushi]] in an attempt to remove [[:ja:吉備真備|Kibi no Makibi]] and others from the government. The rebellion was suppressed two months later, and Kibi no Makibi was demoted. * [[:simple:Bunji_(era)|Bun'ei]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_14|October 14]] [[:simple:1189|, 1189]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:源頼朝|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] attacks Hiraizumi in Oshu. [[:ja:藤原泰衡|Fujiwara no Yasuhira]] is killed by his retainers while fleeing, and [[:ja:奥州藤原氏|the Oshu Fujiwara clan]] is destroyed. * [[:simple:Hōreki|Horeki]] 8 ( [[:simple:October_4|October 4,]] [[:simple:1758|1758]] [[:simple:Gregorian_calendar|in the Gregorian calendar]] ) - [[:ja:徳川家重|Tokugawa Ieshige]] 's chamberlain, [[:simple:Tanuma_Okitsugu|Tanuma Okitsugu,]] is [[:simple:Daimyo|granted]] an additional stipend of 10,000 koku and becomes a daimyo in the shogunate. * [[:simple:Ansei|Ansei]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_9|October 9,]] [[:simple:1858|1858]] [[:simple:Gregorian_calendar|in the Gregorian calendar]] ) - [[:ja:日仏修好通商条約|Treaty of Amity and Commerce between Japan and France]] signed

== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 9th year（[[:en:1286|1286]] [[:en:September 22|September 22]] ） – [[:en:Mugaku Sogen|Mukaku Sogen]] 、[[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai sect]] の [[:en:Monk|monk]] （* [[:en:1226|1226]] ） * [[:en:Bunpō|Bunpō]] 1st year（[[:en:1317|1317]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Fushimi|Fushimi Tennō]] 、92代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （* [[:en:1265|1265]] ） * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9th year（[[:en:1632|1632]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Asano Nagaakira|Asano Nagamasa]] 、[[:en:Ashimori Domain|Ashimori Domain]] 主、[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主、[[:en:Hiroshima Domain|Hiroshima Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1586|1586]] )

* [[:simple:Kōan_(Kamakura_period)|Koan]] 9 ( [[:simple:September_22|September 22,]] [[:simple:1286|1286]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:無学祖元|Mugai Sogen]], a [[:ja:臨済宗|Rinzai sect]] [[:ja:比丘|monk]] (born [[:simple:1226|1226]] ) * First year of [[:simple:Bunpō|the Bunpo era]] ( [[:simple:October_8|October 8,]] [[:simple:1317|1317]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:simple:Emperor_Fushimi|Emperor Fushimi]], the 92nd Emperor (* [[:simple:1265|1265]] ) * [[:simple:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9 ( [[:simple:October_16|October 16,]] [[:simple:1632|1632]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:浅野長晟|Asano Nagaakira]], [[:ja:足守藩|Lord of the Ashimori Domain]], [[:ja:紀州藩|Lord of the Kishu Domain]], and [[:ja:広島藩|Lord of the Hiroshima Domain]] (* [[:simple:1586|1586]] )

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} == Events == * {{ill|Chūhira|ja|中平|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūhira|qq=|1=Zhongping|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011722}} 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:189|189]] [[:en:September 30|September 30]] ） – [[:en:Han_dynasty#Eastern_Han|Later Han]]{{citation needed|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Later Han|qq=}} の都・{{ill|Luoyang|ja|洛陽|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Luoyang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 洛陽市|1=Luoyang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187136}} を占領した [[:en:Dong Zhuo|Dong Zhuo]] が [[:en:Liu Bian|Shaodi Bian]] を廃し [[:en:Emperor Xian of Han|Xian Di]] を擁立
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zhongping|ja|中平|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūhira|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011722}} 6 ( [[:simple:September_30|September 30,]] [[:simple:189|189]] [[:simple:Julian_calendar|in the Julian calendar]] ) - [[:simple:Dong_Zhuo|Dong Zhuo]], who occupied [[:simple:Luoyang|Luoyang]], the capital of [[:ja:後漢|the Later Han Dynasty]], deposed [[:ja:少帝弁|Emperor Bian]] and installed [[:ja:献帝_(漢)|Emperor Xian.]] * [[:simple:Tenpyō|Tenpyo]] 12 ( [[:simple:September_28|September 28,]] [[:simple:740|740]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:藤原広嗣の乱|Fujiwara no Hirotsugu Rebellion]] . Dazai no Shoni Fujiwara no Hirotsugu rebelled in [[:ja:筑紫|Tsukushi]] in an attempt to remove [[:ja:吉備真備|Kibi no Makibi]] and others from the government. The rebellion was suppressed two months later, and Kibi no Makibi was demoted. * [[:simple:Bunji_(era)|Bun'ei]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_14|October 14]] [[:simple:1189|, 1189]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:源頼朝|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] attacks Hiraizumi in Oshu. [[:ja:藤原泰衡|Fujiwara no Yasuhira]] is killed by his retainers while fleeing, and [[:ja:奥州藤原氏|the Oshu Fujiwara clan]] is destroyed. * [[:simple:Hōreki|Horeki]] 8 ( [[:simple:October_4|October 4,]] [[:simple:1758|1758]] [[:simple:Gregorian_calendar|in the Gregorian calendar]] ) - [[:ja:徳川家重|Tokugawa Ieshige]] 's chamberlain, [[:simple:Tanuma_Okitsugu|Tanuma Okitsugu,]] is [[:simple:Daimyo|granted]] an additional stipend of 10,000 koku and becomes a daimyo in the shogunate. * [[:simple:Ansei|Ansei]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_9|October 9,]] [[:simple:1858|1858]] [[:simple:Gregorian_calendar|in the Gregorian calendar]] ) - [[:ja:日仏修好通商条約|Treaty of Amity and Commerce between Japan and France]] signed
== Births == * [[:en:Engi (era)|Engi]] 12nd year（[[:en:912|912]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ） – [[:en:Ryōgen|Ryōgen]] 、[[:en:Tiantai|Tendai sect]] 中興の祖（+ [[:en:985|985]] ） * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 1st year（[[:en:1161|1161]] [[:en:September 23|September 23]] ） – {{ill|Taka-kura Tennō|ja|Emperor Takakura|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taka-kura Tennō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 、80代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1181|1181]] ） * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year（[[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – [[:en:Takeda Nobuyoshi|Takeda Shinyoshi]] 、[[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] の五男（+ [[:en:1603|1603]] ） * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 3rd year（[[:en:1675|1675]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Higashiyama|Tōzan Tennō]] 、113代天皇（+ [[:en:1709|1709]] ） * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 5th year（[[:en:1808|1808]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|lt=Sakai Tadayoshi|lt_ja=酒井忠良|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|qq=|1=Sakai Tadakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644167}} 、[[:en:Isesaki Domain|Isesaki Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1834|1834]] ）
== Births ==
* [[:simple:Engi_(era)|Engi]] 12 ( [[:simple:October_15|October 15,]] [[:simple:912|912]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:良源|Ryogen]], the founder of [[:ja:天台宗|the Tendai]] sect (d [[:simple:985|. 985]] ) * The first year of [[:simple:Ōhō|the Oho era]] ( [[:simple:September_23|September 23,]] [[:simple:1161|1161]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:simple:Emperor_Takakura|Emperor Takakura]], the 80th [[:simple:Emperor_of_Japan|Emperor]] (d [[:simple:1181|. 1181]] ) * [[:simple:Tenshō_(Momoyama_period)|Tensho]] 11 ( [[:simple:October_18|October 18,]] [[:simple:1583|1583]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:武田信吉|Takeda Nobuyoshi]], fifth son of [[:simple:Tokugawa_Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (born [[:simple:1603|1603]] ) * [[:simple:Enpō|Enpo]] 3 ( [[:simple:October_21|October 21,]] [[:simple:1675|1675]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:東山天皇|Emperor Higashiyama]], 113th Emperor (d [[:simple:1709|. 1709]] ) * [[:simple:Bunka|Bunka]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_22|October 22,]] [[:simple:1808|1808]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:酒井忠良_(伊勢崎藩主)|Sakai Tadayoshi]], [[:ja:伊勢崎藩|Lord of Isesaki Domain]] (d [[:simple:1834|. 1834]] )
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 9th year（[[:en:1286|1286]] [[:en:September 22|September 22]] ） – [[:en:Mugaku Sogen|Mukaku Sogen]] 、[[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai sect]] の [[:en:Monk|monk]] （* [[:en:1226|1226]] ） * [[:en:Bunpō|Bunpō]] 1st year（[[:en:1317|1317]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Fushimi|Fushimi Tennō]] 、92代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （* [[:en:1265|1265]] ） * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9th year（[[:en:1632|1632]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Asano Nagaakira|Asano Nagamasa]] 、[[:en:Ashimori Domain|Ashimori Domain]] 主、[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主、[[:en:Hiroshima Domain|Hiroshima Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1586|1586]] )
== Deaths ==
* [[:simple:Kōan_(Kamakura_period)|Koan]] 9 ( [[:simple:September_22|September 22,]] [[:simple:1286|1286]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:無学祖元|Mugai Sogen]], a [[:ja:臨済宗|Rinzai sect]] [[:ja:比丘|monk]] (born [[:simple:1226|1226]] ) * First year of [[:simple:Bunpō|the Bunpo era]] ( [[:simple:October_8|October 8,]] [[:simple:1317|1317]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:simple:Emperor_Fushimi|Emperor Fushimi]], the 92nd Emperor (* [[:simple:1265|1265]] ) * [[:simple:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9 ( [[:simple:October_16|October 16,]] [[:simple:1632|1632]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:浅野長晟|Asano Nagaakira]], [[:ja:足守藩|Lord of the Ashimori Domain]], [[:ja:紀州藩|Lord of the Kishu Domain]], and [[:ja:広島藩|Lord of the Hiroshima Domain]] (* [[:simple:1586|1586]] )

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} == Events == * {{ill|Chūhira|ja|中平|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūhira|qq=|1=Zhongping|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011722}} 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:189|189]] [[:en:September 30|September 30]] ） – [[:en:Han_dynasty#Eastern_Han|Later Han]]{{citation needed|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Later Han|qq=}} の都・{{ill|Luoyang|ja|洛陽|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Luoyang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 洛陽市|1=Luoyang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187136}} を占領した [[:en:Dong Zhuo|Dong Zhuo]] が [[:en:Liu Bian|Shaodi Bian]] を廃し [[:en:Emperor Xian of Han|Xian Di]] を擁立
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zhongping|ja|中平|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūhira|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011722}} 6 ( [[:simple:September_30|September 30,]] [[:simple:189|189]] [[:simple:Julian_calendar|in the Julian calendar]] ) - [[:simple:Dong_Zhuo|Dong Zhuo]], who occupied [[:simple:Luoyang|Luoyang]], the capital of [[:ja:後漢|the Later Han Dynasty]], deposed [[:ja:少帝弁|Emperor Bian]] and installed [[:ja:献帝_(漢)|Emperor Xian.]] * [[:simple:Tenpyō|Tenpyo]] 12 ( [[:simple:September_28|September 28,]] [[:simple:740|740]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:藤原広嗣の乱|Fujiwara no Hirotsugu Rebellion]] . Dazai no Shoni Fujiwara no Hirotsugu rebelled in [[:ja:筑紫|Tsukushi]] in an attempt to remove [[:ja:吉備真備|Kibi no Makibi]] and others from the government. The rebellion was suppressed two months later, and Kibi no Makibi was demoted. * [[:simple:Bunji_(era)|Bun'ei]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_14|October 14]] [[:simple:1189|, 1189]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:源頼朝|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] attacks Hiraizumi in Oshu. [[:ja:藤原泰衡|Fujiwara no Yasuhira]] is killed by his retainers while fleeing, and [[:ja:奥州藤原氏|the Oshu Fujiwara clan]] is destroyed. * [[:simple:Hōreki|Horeki]] 8 ( [[:simple:October_4|October 4,]] [[:simple:1758|1758]] [[:simple:Gregorian_calendar|in the Gregorian calendar]] ) - [[:ja:徳川家重|Tokugawa Ieshige]] 's chamberlain, [[:simple:Tanuma_Okitsugu|Tanuma Okitsugu,]] is [[:simple:Daimyo|granted]] an additional stipend of 10,000 koku and becomes a daimyo in the shogunate. * [[:simple:Ansei|Ansei]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_9|October 9,]] [[:simple:1858|1858]] [[:simple:Gregorian_calendar|in the Gregorian calendar]] ) - [[:ja:日仏修好通商条約|Treaty of Amity and Commerce between Japan and France]] signed
== Births == * [[:en:Engi (era)|Engi]] 12nd year（[[:en:912|912]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ） – [[:en:Ryōgen|Ryōgen]] 、[[:en:Tiantai|Tendai sect]] 中興の祖（+ [[:en:985|985]] ） * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 1st year（[[:en:1161|1161]] [[:en:September 23|September 23]] ） – {{ill|Taka-kura Tennō|ja|Emperor Takakura|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taka-kura Tennō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 、80代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1181|1181]] ） * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year（[[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – [[:en:Takeda Nobuyoshi|Takeda Shinyoshi]] 、[[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] の五男（+ [[:en:1603|1603]] ） * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 3rd year（[[:en:1675|1675]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Higashiyama|Tōzan Tennō]] 、113代天皇（+ [[:en:1709|1709]] ） * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 5th year（[[:en:1808|1808]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|lt=Sakai Tadayoshi|lt_ja=酒井忠良|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|qq=|1=Sakai Tadakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644167}} 、[[:en:Isesaki Domain|Isesaki Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1834|1834]] ）
== Births ==
* [[:simple:Engi_(era)|Engi]] 12 ( [[:simple:October_15|October 15,]] [[:simple:912|912]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:良源|Ryogen]], the founder of [[:ja:天台宗|the Tendai]] sect (d [[:simple:985|. 985]] ) * The first year of [[:simple:Ōhō|the Oho era]] ( [[:simple:September_23|September 23,]] [[:simple:1161|1161]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:simple:Emperor_Takakura|Emperor Takakura]], the 80th [[:simple:Emperor_of_Japan|Emperor]] (d [[:simple:1181|. 1181]] ) * [[:simple:Tenshō_(Momoyama_period)|Tensho]] 11 ( [[:simple:October_18|October 18,]] [[:simple:1583|1583]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:武田信吉|Takeda Nobuyoshi]], fifth son of [[:simple:Tokugawa_Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (born [[:simple:1603|1603]] ) * [[:simple:Enpō|Enpo]] 3 ( [[:simple:October_21|October 21,]] [[:simple:1675|1675]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:東山天皇|Emperor Higashiyama]], 113th Emperor (d [[:simple:1709|. 1709]] ) * [[:simple:Bunka|Bunka]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_22|October 22,]] [[:simple:1808|1808]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:酒井忠良_(伊勢崎藩主)|Sakai Tadayoshi]], [[:ja:伊勢崎藩|Lord of Isesaki Domain]] (d [[:simple:1834|. 1834]] )
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 9th year（[[:en:1286|1286]] [[:en:September 22|September 22]] ） – [[:en:Mugaku Sogen|Mukaku Sogen]] 、[[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai sect]] の [[:en:Monk|monk]] （* [[:en:1226|1226]] ） * [[:en:Bunpō|Bunpō]] 1st year（[[:en:1317|1317]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Fushimi|Fushimi Tennō]] 、92代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （* [[:en:1265|1265]] ） * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9th year（[[:en:1632|1632]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Asano Nagaakira|Asano Nagamasa]] 、[[:en:Ashimori Domain|Ashimori Domain]] 主、[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主、[[:en:Hiroshima Domain|Hiroshima Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1586|1586]] )
== Deaths ==
* [[:simple:Kōan_(Kamakura_period)|Koan]] 9 ( [[:simple:September_22|September 22,]] [[:simple:1286|1286]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:無学祖元|Mugai Sogen]], a [[:ja:臨済宗|Rinzai sect]] [[:ja:比丘|monk]] (born [[:simple:1226|1226]] ) * First year of [[:simple:Bunpō|the Bunpo era]] ( [[:simple:October_8|October 8,]] [[:simple:1317|1317]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:simple:Emperor_Fushimi|Emperor Fushimi]], the 92nd Emperor (* [[:simple:1265|1265]] ) * [[:simple:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9 ( [[:simple:October_16|October 16,]] [[:simple:1632|1632]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:浅野長晟|Asano Nagaakira]], [[:ja:足守藩|Lord of the Ashimori Domain]], [[:ja:紀州藩|Lord of the Kishu Domain]], and [[:ja:広島藩|Lord of the Hiroshima Domain]] (* [[:simple:1586|1586]] )

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} == Events == * {{ill|Chūhira|ja|中平|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūhira|qq=|1=Zhongping|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011722}} 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:189|189]] [[:en:September 30|September 30]] ） – [[:en:Han_dynasty#Eastern_Han|Later Han]]{{citation needed|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Later Han|qq=}} の都・{{ill|Luoyang|ja|洛陽|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Luoyang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 洛陽市|1=Luoyang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187136}} を占領した [[:en:Dong Zhuo|Dong Zhuo]] が [[:en:Liu Bian|Shaodi Bian]] を廃し [[:en:Emperor Xian of Han|Xian Di]] を擁立
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zhongping|ja|中平|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūhira|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011722}} 6 ( [[:simple:September_30|September 30,]] [[:simple:189|189]] [[:simple:Julian_calendar|in the Julian calendar]] ) - [[:simple:Dong_Zhuo|Dong Zhuo]], who occupied [[:simple:Luoyang|Luoyang]], the capital of [[:ja:後漢|the Later Han Dynasty]], deposed [[:ja:少帝弁|Emperor Bian]] and installed [[:ja:献帝_(漢)|Emperor Xian.]] * [[:simple:Tenpyō|Tenpyo]] 12 ( [[:simple:September_28|September 28,]] [[:simple:740|740]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:藤原広嗣の乱|Fujiwara no Hirotsugu Rebellion]] . Dazai no Shoni Fujiwara no Hirotsugu rebelled in [[:ja:筑紫|Tsukushi]] in an attempt to remove [[:ja:吉備真備|Kibi no Makibi]] and others from the government. The rebellion was suppressed two months later, and Kibi no Makibi was demoted. * [[:simple:Bunji_(era)|Bun'ei]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_14|October 14]] [[:simple:1189|, 1189]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:源頼朝|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] attacks Hiraizumi in Oshu. [[:ja:藤原泰衡|Fujiwara no Yasuhira]] is killed by his retainers while fleeing, and [[:ja:奥州藤原氏|the Oshu Fujiwara clan]] is destroyed. * [[:simple:Hōreki|Horeki]] 8 ( [[:simple:October_4|October 4,]] [[:simple:1758|1758]] [[:simple:Gregorian_calendar|in the Gregorian calendar]] ) - [[:ja:徳川家重|Tokugawa Ieshige]] 's chamberlain, [[:simple:Tanuma_Okitsugu|Tanuma Okitsugu,]] is [[:simple:Daimyo|granted]] an additional stipend of 10,000 koku and becomes a daimyo in the shogunate. * [[:simple:Ansei|Ansei]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_9|October 9,]] [[:simple:1858|1858]] [[:simple:Gregorian_calendar|in the Gregorian calendar]] ) - [[:ja:日仏修好通商条約|Treaty of Amity and Commerce between Japan and France]] signed
== Births == * [[:en:Engi (era)|Engi]] 12nd year（[[:en:912|912]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ） – [[:en:Ryōgen|Ryōgen]] 、[[:en:Tiantai|Tendai sect]] 中興の祖（+ [[:en:985|985]] ） * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 1st year（[[:en:1161|1161]] [[:en:September 23|September 23]] ） – {{ill|Taka-kura Tennō|ja|Emperor Takakura|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taka-kura Tennō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 、80代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1181|1181]] ） * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year（[[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – [[:en:Takeda Nobuyoshi|Takeda Shinyoshi]] 、[[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] の五男（+ [[:en:1603|1603]] ） * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 3rd year（[[:en:1675|1675]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Higashiyama|Tōzan Tennō]] 、113代天皇（+ [[:en:1709|1709]] ） * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 5th year（[[:en:1808|1808]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|lt=Sakai Tadayoshi|lt_ja=酒井忠良|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|qq=|1=Sakai Tadakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644167}} 、[[:en:Isesaki Domain|Isesaki Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1834|1834]] ）
== Births ==
* [[:simple:Engi_(era)|Engi]] 12 ( [[:simple:October_15|October 15,]] [[:simple:912|912]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:良源|Ryogen]], the founder of [[:ja:天台宗|the Tendai]] sect (d [[:simple:985|. 985]] ) * The first year of [[:simple:Ōhō|the Oho era]] ( [[:simple:September_23|September 23,]] [[:simple:1161|1161]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:simple:Emperor_Takakura|Emperor Takakura]], the 80th [[:simple:Emperor_of_Japan|Emperor]] (d [[:simple:1181|. 1181]] ) * [[:simple:Tenshō_(Momoyama_period)|Tensho]] 11 ( [[:simple:October_18|October 18,]] [[:simple:1583|1583]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:武田信吉|Takeda Nobuyoshi]], fifth son of [[:simple:Tokugawa_Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (born [[:simple:1603|1603]] ) * [[:simple:Enpō|Enpo]] 3 ( [[:simple:October_21|October 21,]] [[:simple:1675|1675]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:東山天皇|Emperor Higashiyama]], 113th Emperor (d [[:simple:1709|. 1709]] ) * [[:simple:Bunka|Bunka]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_22|October 22,]] [[:simple:1808|1808]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:酒井忠良_(伊勢崎藩主)|Sakai Tadayoshi]], [[:ja:伊勢崎藩|Lord of Isesaki Domain]] (d [[:simple:1834|. 1834]] )
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 9th year（[[:en:1286|1286]] [[:en:September 22|September 22]] ） – [[:en:Mugaku Sogen|Mukaku Sogen]] 、[[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai sect]] の [[:en:Monk|monk]] （* [[:en:1226|1226]] ） * [[:en:Bunpō|Bunpō]] 1st year（[[:en:1317|1317]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Fushimi|Fushimi Tennō]] 、92代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （* [[:en:1265|1265]] ） * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9th year（[[:en:1632|1632]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Asano Nagaakira|Asano Nagamasa]] 、[[:en:Ashimori Domain|Ashimori Domain]] 主、[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主、[[:en:Hiroshima Domain|Hiroshima Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1586|1586]] )
== Deaths ==
* [[:simple:Kōan_(Kamakura_period)|Koan]] 9 ( [[:simple:September_22|September 22,]] [[:simple:1286|1286]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:無学祖元|Mugai Sogen]], a [[:ja:臨済宗|Rinzai sect]] [[:ja:比丘|monk]] (born [[:simple:1226|1226]] ) * First year of [[:simple:Bunpō|the Bunpo era]] ( [[:simple:October_8|October 8,]] [[:simple:1317|1317]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:simple:Emperor_Fushimi|Emperor Fushimi]], the 92nd Emperor (* [[:simple:1265|1265]] ) * [[:simple:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9 ( [[:simple:October_16|October 16,]] [[:simple:1632|1632]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:浅野長晟|Asano Nagaakira]], [[:ja:足守藩|Lord of the Ashimori Domain]], [[:ja:紀州藩|Lord of the Kishu Domain]], and [[:ja:広島藩|Lord of the Hiroshima Domain]] (* [[:simple:1586|1586]] )

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} == Events == * {{ill|Chūhira|ja|中平|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūhira|1=Zhongping|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011722}} 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:189|189]] [[:en:September 30|September 30]] ） – [[:en:Han_dynasty#Eastern_Han|Later Han]]{{citation needed|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Later Han|qq=}} の都・{{ill|Luoyang|ja|洛陽|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Luoyang|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 洛陽市|1=Luoyang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187136}} を占領した [[:en:Dong Zhuo|Dong Zhuo]] が [[:en:Liu Bian|Shaodi Bian]] を廃し [[:en:Emperor Xian of Han|Xian Di]] を擁立
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zhongping|ja|中平|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūhira|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011722}} 6 ( [[:simple:September_30|September 30,]] [[:simple:189|189]] [[:simple:Julian_calendar|in the Julian calendar]] ) - [[:simple:Dong_Zhuo|Dong Zhuo]], who occupied [[:simple:Luoyang|Luoyang]], the capital of [[:ja:後漢|the Later Han Dynasty]], deposed [[:ja:少帝弁|Emperor Bian]] and installed [[:ja:献帝_(漢)|Emperor Xian.]] * [[:simple:Tenpyō|Tenpyo]] 12 ( [[:simple:September_28|September 28,]] [[:simple:740|740]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:藤原広嗣の乱|Fujiwara no Hirotsugu Rebellion]] . Dazai no Shoni Fujiwara no Hirotsugu rebelled in [[:ja:筑紫|Tsukushi]] in an attempt to remove [[:ja:吉備真備|Kibi no Makibi]] and others from the government. The rebellion was suppressed two months later, and Kibi no Makibi was demoted. * [[:simple:Bunji_(era)|Bun'ei]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_14|October 14]] [[:simple:1189|, 1189]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:源頼朝|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] attacks Hiraizumi in Oshu. [[:ja:藤原泰衡|Fujiwara no Yasuhira]] is killed by his retainers while fleeing, and [[:ja:奥州藤原氏|the Oshu Fujiwara clan]] is destroyed. * [[:simple:Hōreki|Horeki]] 8 ( [[:simple:October_4|October 4,]] [[:simple:1758|1758]] [[:simple:Gregorian_calendar|in the Gregorian calendar]] ) - [[:ja:徳川家重|Tokugawa Ieshige]] 's chamberlain, [[:simple:Tanuma_Okitsugu|Tanuma Okitsugu,]] is [[:simple:Daimyo|granted]] an additional stipend of 10,000 koku and becomes a daimyo in the shogunate. * [[:simple:Ansei|Ansei]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_9|October 9,]] [[:simple:1858|1858]] [[:simple:Gregorian_calendar|in the Gregorian calendar]] ) - [[:ja:日仏修好通商条約|Treaty of Amity and Commerce between Japan and France]] signed
== Births == * [[:en:Engi (era)|Engi]] 12nd year（[[:en:912|912]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ） – [[:en:Ryōgen|Ryōgen]] 、[[:en:Tiantai|Tendai sect]] 中興の祖（+ [[:en:985|985]] ） * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 1st year（[[:en:1161|1161]] [[:en:September 23|September 23]] ） – {{ill|Taka-kura Tennō|ja|Emperor Takakura|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taka-kura Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 、80代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1181|1181]] ） * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year（[[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – [[:en:Takeda Nobuyoshi|Takeda Shinyoshi]] 、[[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] の五男（+ [[:en:1603|1603]] ） * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 3rd year（[[:en:1675|1675]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Higashiyama|Tōzan Tennō]] 、113代天皇（+ [[:en:1709|1709]] ） * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 5th year（[[:en:1808|1808]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|lt=Sakai Tadayoshi|lt_ja=酒井忠良|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|1=Sakai Tadakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644167}} 、[[:en:Isesaki Domain|Isesaki Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1834|1834]] ）
== Births ==
* [[:simple:Engi_(era)|Engi]] 12 ( [[:simple:October_15|October 15,]] [[:simple:912|912]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:良源|Ryogen]], the founder of [[:ja:天台宗|the Tendai]] sect (d [[:simple:985|. 985]] ) * The first year of [[:simple:Ōhō|the Oho era]] ( [[:simple:September_23|September 23,]] [[:simple:1161|1161]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:simple:Emperor_Takakura|Emperor Takakura]], the 80th [[:simple:Emperor_of_Japan|Emperor]] (d [[:simple:1181|. 1181]] ) * [[:simple:Tenshō_(Momoyama_period)|Tensho]] 11 ( [[:simple:October_18|October 18,]] [[:simple:1583|1583]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:武田信吉|Takeda Nobuyoshi]], fifth son of [[:simple:Tokugawa_Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (born [[:simple:1603|1603]] ) * [[:simple:Enpō|Enpo]] 3 ( [[:simple:October_21|October 21,]] [[:simple:1675|1675]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:東山天皇|Emperor Higashiyama]], 113th Emperor (d [[:simple:1709|. 1709]] ) * [[:simple:Bunka|Bunka]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_22|October 22,]] [[:simple:1808|1808]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:酒井忠良_(伊勢崎藩主)|Sakai Tadayoshi]], [[:ja:伊勢崎藩|Lord of Isesaki Domain]] (d [[:simple:1834|. 1834]] )
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 9th year（[[:en:1286|1286]] [[:en:September 22|September 22]] ） – [[:en:Mugaku Sogen|Mukaku Sogen]] 、[[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai sect]] の [[:en:Monk|monk]] （* [[:en:1226|1226]] ） * [[:en:Bunpō|Bunpō]] 1st year（[[:en:1317|1317]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Fushimi|Fushimi Tennō]] 、92代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （* [[:en:1265|1265]] ） * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9th year（[[:en:1632|1632]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Asano Nagaakira|Asano Nagamasa]] 、[[:en:Ashimori Domain|Ashimori Domain]] 主、[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主、[[:en:Hiroshima Domain|Hiroshima Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1586|1586]] )
== Deaths ==
* [[:simple:Kōan_(Kamakura_period)|Koan]] 9 ( [[:simple:September_22|September 22,]] [[:simple:1286|1286]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:無学祖元|Mugai Sogen]], a [[:ja:臨済宗|Rinzai sect]] [[:ja:比丘|monk]] (born [[:simple:1226|1226]] ) * First year of [[:simple:Bunpō|the Bunpo era]] ( [[:simple:October_8|October 8,]] [[:simple:1317|1317]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:simple:Emperor_Fushimi|Emperor Fushimi]], the 92nd Emperor (* [[:simple:1265|1265]] ) * [[:simple:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9 ( [[:simple:October_16|October 16,]] [[:simple:1632|1632]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:浅野長晟|Asano Nagaakira]], [[:ja:足守藩|Lord of the Ashimori Domain]], [[:ja:紀州藩|Lord of the Kishu Domain]], and [[:ja:広島藩|Lord of the Hiroshima Domain]] (* [[:simple:1586|1586]] )

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 3일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初三]][[zh:九月初三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840404]] Wikidata name: 3rd day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 3|qq=September 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} == Events == * {{ill|Chūhira|ja|中平|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūhira|1=Zhongping|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011722}} 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:189|189]] [[:en:September 30|September 30]] ） – [[:en:Han_dynasty#Eastern_Han|Later Han]]{{citation needed|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Later Han|qq=}} の都・{{ill|Luoyang|ja|洛陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Luoyang|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 洛陽市|1=Luoyang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187136}} を占領した [[:en:Dong Zhuo|Dong Zhuo]] が [[:en:Liu Bian|Shaodi Bian]] を廃し [[:en:Emperor Xian of Han|Xian Di]] を擁立
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zhongping|ja|中平|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūhira|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011722}} 6 ( [[:simple:September_30|September 30,]] [[:simple:189|189]] [[:simple:Julian_calendar|in the Julian calendar]] ) - [[:simple:Dong_Zhuo|Dong Zhuo]], who occupied [[:simple:Luoyang|Luoyang]], the capital of [[:ja:後漢|the Later Han Dynasty]], deposed [[:ja:少帝弁|Emperor Bian]] and installed [[:ja:献帝_(漢)|Emperor Xian.]] * [[:simple:Tenpyō|Tenpyo]] 12 ( [[:simple:September_28|September 28,]] [[:simple:740|740]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:藤原広嗣の乱|Fujiwara no Hirotsugu Rebellion]] . Dazai no Shoni Fujiwara no Hirotsugu rebelled in [[:ja:筑紫|Tsukushi]] in an attempt to remove [[:ja:吉備真備|Kibi no Makibi]] and others from the government. The rebellion was suppressed two months later, and Kibi no Makibi was demoted. * [[:simple:Bunji_(era)|Bun'ei]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_14|October 14]] [[:simple:1189|, 1189]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:源頼朝|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] attacks Hiraizumi in Oshu. [[:ja:藤原泰衡|Fujiwara no Yasuhira]] is killed by his retainers while fleeing, and [[:ja:奥州藤原氏|the Oshu Fujiwara clan]] is destroyed. * [[:simple:Hōreki|Horeki]] 8 ( [[:simple:October_4|October 4,]] [[:simple:1758|1758]] [[:simple:Gregorian_calendar|in the Gregorian calendar]] ) - [[:ja:徳川家重|Tokugawa Ieshige]] 's chamberlain, [[:simple:Tanuma_Okitsugu|Tanuma Okitsugu,]] is [[:simple:Daimyo|granted]] an additional stipend of 10,000 koku and becomes a daimyo in the shogunate. * [[:simple:Ansei|Ansei]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_9|October 9,]] [[:simple:1858|1858]] [[:simple:Gregorian_calendar|in the Gregorian calendar]] ) - [[:ja:日仏修好通商条約|Treaty of Amity and Commerce between Japan and France]] signed
== Births == * [[:en:Engi (era)|Engi]] 12nd year（[[:en:912|912]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ） – [[:en:Ryōgen|Ryōgen]] 、[[:en:Tiantai|Tendai sect]] 中興の祖（+ [[:en:985|985]] ） * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 1st year（[[:en:1161|1161]] [[:en:September 23|September 23]] ） – {{ill|Taka-kura Tennō|ja|Emperor Takakura|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taka-kura Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 、80代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1181|1181]] ） * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year（[[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – [[:en:Takeda Nobuyoshi|Takeda Shinyoshi]] 、[[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] の五男（+ [[:en:1603|1603]] ） * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 3rd year（[[:en:1675|1675]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Higashiyama|Tōzan Tennō]] 、113代天皇（+ [[:en:1709|1709]] ） * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 5th year（[[:en:1808|1808]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|lt=Sakai Tadayoshi|lt_ja=酒井忠良|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|1=Sakai Tadakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644167}} 、[[:en:Isesaki Domain|Isesaki Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1834|1834]] ）
== Births ==
* [[:simple:Engi_(era)|Engi]] 12 ( [[:simple:October_15|October 15,]] [[:simple:912|912]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:良源|Ryogen]], the founder of [[:ja:天台宗|the Tendai]] sect (d [[:simple:985|. 985]] ) * The first year of [[:simple:Ōhō|the Oho era]] ( [[:simple:September_23|September 23,]] [[:simple:1161|1161]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:simple:Emperor_Takakura|Emperor Takakura]], the 80th [[:simple:Emperor_of_Japan|Emperor]] (d [[:simple:1181|. 1181]] ) * [[:simple:Tenshō_(Momoyama_period)|Tensho]] 11 ( [[:simple:October_18|October 18,]] [[:simple:1583|1583]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:武田信吉|Takeda Nobuyoshi]], fifth son of [[:simple:Tokugawa_Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (born [[:simple:1603|1603]] ) * [[:simple:Enpō|Enpo]] 3 ( [[:simple:October_21|October 21,]] [[:simple:1675|1675]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:東山天皇|Emperor Higashiyama]], 113th Emperor (d [[:simple:1709|. 1709]] ) * [[:simple:Bunka|Bunka]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_22|October 22,]] [[:simple:1808|1808]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:酒井忠良_(伊勢崎藩主)|Sakai Tadayoshi]], [[:ja:伊勢崎藩|Lord of Isesaki Domain]] (d [[:simple:1834|. 1834]] )
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 9th year（[[:en:1286|1286]] [[:en:September 22|September 22]] ） – [[:en:Mugaku Sogen|Mukaku Sogen]] 、[[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai sect]] の [[:en:Monk|monk]] （* [[:en:1226|1226]] ） * [[:en:Bunpō|Bunpō]] 1st year（[[:en:1317|1317]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Fushimi|Fushimi Tennō]] 、92代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （* [[:en:1265|1265]] ） * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9th year（[[:en:1632|1632]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Asano Nagaakira|Asano Nagamasa]] 、[[:en:Ashimori Domain|Ashimori Domain]] 主、[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主、[[:en:Hiroshima Domain|Hiroshima Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1586|1586]] )
== Deaths ==
* [[:simple:Kōan_(Kamakura_period)|Koan]] 9 ( [[:simple:September_22|September 22,]] [[:simple:1286|1286]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:無学祖元|Mugai Sogen]], a [[:ja:臨済宗|Rinzai sect]] [[:ja:比丘|monk]] (born [[:simple:1226|1226]] ) * First year of [[:simple:Bunpō|the Bunpo era]] ( [[:simple:October_8|October 8,]] [[:simple:1317|1317]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:simple:Emperor_Fushimi|Emperor Fushimi]], the 92nd Emperor (* [[:simple:1265|1265]] ) * [[:simple:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9 ( [[:simple:October_16|October 16,]] [[:simple:1632|1632]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:浅野長晟|Asano Nagaakira]], [[:ja:足守藩|Lord of the Ashimori Domain]], [[:ja:紀州藩|Lord of the Kishu Domain]], and [[:ja:広島藩|Lord of the Hiroshima Domain]] (* [[:simple:1586|1586]] )

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 3일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初三]][[zh:九月初三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840404]] Wikidata name: 3rd day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 3|qq=September 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} == Events == * {{ill|Chūhira|ja|中平|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūhira|1=Zhongping|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011722}} 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:189|189]] [[:en:September 30|September 30]] ） – [[:en:Han_dynasty#Eastern_Han|Later Han]]{{citation needed|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Later Han|qq=}} の都・{{ill|Luoyang|ja|洛陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Luoyang|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 洛陽市|1=Luoyang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187136}} を占領した [[:en:Dong Zhuo|Dong Zhuo]] が [[:en:Liu Bian|Shaodi Bian]] を廃し [[:en:Emperor Xian of Han|Xian Di]] を擁立
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zhongping|ja|中平|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūhira|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011722}} 6 ( [[:simple:September_30|September 30,]] [[:simple:189|189]] [[:simple:Julian_calendar|in the Julian calendar]] ) - [[:simple:Dong_Zhuo|Dong Zhuo]], who occupied [[:simple:Luoyang|Luoyang]], the capital of [[:ja:後漢|the Later Han Dynasty]], deposed [[:ja:少帝弁|Emperor Bian]] and installed [[:ja:献帝_(漢)|Emperor Xian.]] * [[:simple:Tenpyō|Tenpyo]] 12 ( [[:simple:September_28|September 28,]] [[:simple:740|740]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:藤原広嗣の乱|Fujiwara no Hirotsugu Rebellion]] . Dazai no Shoni Fujiwara no Hirotsugu rebelled in [[:ja:筑紫|Tsukushi]] in an attempt to remove [[:ja:吉備真備|Kibi no Makibi]] and others from the government. The rebellion was suppressed two months later, and Kibi no Makibi was demoted. * [[:simple:Bunji_(era)|Bun'ei]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_14|October 14]] [[:simple:1189|, 1189]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:源頼朝|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] attacks Hiraizumi in Oshu. [[:ja:藤原泰衡|Fujiwara no Yasuhira]] is killed by his retainers while fleeing, and [[:ja:奥州藤原氏|the Oshu Fujiwara clan]] is destroyed. * [[:simple:Hōreki|Horeki]] 8 ( [[:simple:October_4|October 4,]] [[:simple:1758|1758]] [[:simple:Gregorian_calendar|in the Gregorian calendar]] ) - [[:ja:徳川家重|Tokugawa Ieshige]] 's chamberlain, [[:simple:Tanuma_Okitsugu|Tanuma Okitsugu,]] is [[:simple:Daimyo|granted]] an additional stipend of 10,000 koku and becomes a daimyo in the shogunate. * [[:simple:Ansei|Ansei]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_9|October 9,]] [[:simple:1858|1858]] [[:simple:Gregorian_calendar|in the Gregorian calendar]] ) - [[:ja:日仏修好通商条約|Treaty of Amity and Commerce between Japan and France]] signed
== Births == * [[:en:Engi (era)|Engi]] 12nd year（[[:en:912|912]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ） – [[:en:Ryōgen|Ryōgen]] 、[[:en:Tiantai|Tendai sect]] 中興の祖（+ [[:en:985|985]] ） * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 1st year（[[:en:1161|1161]] [[:en:September 23|September 23]] ） – {{ill|Taka-kura Tennō|ja|Emperor Takakura|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taka-kura Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 、80代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1181|1181]] ） * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year（[[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – [[:en:Takeda Nobuyoshi|Takeda Shinyoshi]] 、[[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] の五男（+ [[:en:1603|1603]] ） * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 3rd year（[[:en:1675|1675]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Higashiyama|Tōzan Tennō]] 、113代天皇（+ [[:en:1709|1709]] ） * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 5th year（[[:en:1808|1808]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|lt=Sakai Tadayoshi|lt_ja=酒井忠良|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|1=Sakai Tadakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644167}} 、[[:en:Isesaki Domain|Isesaki Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1834|1834]] ）
== Births ==
* [[:simple:Engi_(era)|Engi]] 12 ( [[:simple:October_15|October 15,]] [[:simple:912|912]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:良源|Ryogen]], the founder of [[:ja:天台宗|the Tendai]] sect (d [[:simple:985|. 985]] ) * The first year of [[:simple:Ōhō|the Oho era]] ( [[:simple:September_23|September 23,]] [[:simple:1161|1161]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:simple:Emperor_Takakura|Emperor Takakura]], the 80th [[:simple:Emperor_of_Japan|Emperor]] (d [[:simple:1181|. 1181]] ) * [[:simple:Tenshō_(Momoyama_period)|Tensho]] 11 ( [[:simple:October_18|October 18,]] [[:simple:1583|1583]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:武田信吉|Takeda Nobuyoshi]], fifth son of [[:simple:Tokugawa_Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (born [[:simple:1603|1603]] ) * [[:simple:Enpō|Enpo]] 3 ( [[:simple:October_21|October 21,]] [[:simple:1675|1675]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:東山天皇|Emperor Higashiyama]], 113th Emperor (d [[:simple:1709|. 1709]] ) * [[:simple:Bunka|Bunka]] 5 ( [[:simple:October_22|October 22,]] [[:simple:1808|1808]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:酒井忠良_(伊勢崎藩主)|Sakai Tadayoshi]], [[:ja:伊勢崎藩|Lord of Isesaki Domain]] (d [[:simple:1834|. 1834]] )
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 9th year（[[:en:1286|1286]] [[:en:September 22|September 22]] ） – [[:en:Mugaku Sogen|Mukaku Sogen]] 、[[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai sect]] の [[:en:Monk|monk]] （* [[:en:1226|1226]] ） * [[:en:Bunpō|Bunpō]] 1st year（[[:en:1317|1317]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Fushimi|Fushimi Tennō]] 、92代 [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （* [[:en:1265|1265]] ） * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9th year（[[:en:1632|1632]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Asano Nagaakira|Asano Nagamasa]] 、[[:en:Ashimori Domain|Ashimori Domain]] 主、[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主、[[:en:Hiroshima Domain|Hiroshima Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1586|1586]] )
== Deaths ==
* [[:simple:Kōan_(Kamakura_period)|Koan]] 9 ( [[:simple:September_22|September 22,]] [[:simple:1286|1286]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:ja:無学祖元|Mugai Sogen]], a [[:ja:臨済宗|Rinzai sect]] [[:ja:比丘|monk]] (born [[:simple:1226|1226]] ) * First year of [[:simple:Bunpō|the Bunpo era]] ( [[:simple:October_8|October 8,]] [[:simple:1317|1317]] in the Julian calendar) - [[:simple:Emperor_Fushimi|Emperor Fushimi]], the 92nd Emperor (* [[:simple:1265|1265]] ) * [[:simple:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9 ( [[:simple:October_16|October 16,]] [[:simple:1632|1632]] in the Gregorian calendar) - [[:ja:浅野長晟|Asano Nagaakira]], [[:ja:足守藩|Lord of the Ashimori Domain]], [[:ja:紀州藩|Lord of the Kishu Domain]], and [[:ja:広島藩|Lord of the Hiroshima Domain]] (* [[:simple:1586|1586]] )
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|2|9|4|8|3|10|9|0903|qq=}}
